'''鈭歮-k-w-ch''' ('''kamakwechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curarize|curarize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-w-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curarize|curarize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-k-w-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kamakwechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimakwechoko|thimakwechoko]] || [[word:jimakwechoko|jimakwechoko]] || [[word:shimakwechoko|shimakwechoko]] || [[word:kimakwechoko|kimakwechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomakwechoko|thomakwechoko]] || [[word:jomakwechoko|jomakwechoko]] || [[word:shomakwechoko|shomakwechoko]] || [[word:komakwechoko|komakwechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙makwechoko|th忙makwechoko]] || [[word:j忙makwechoko|j忙makwechoko]] || [[word:sh忙makwechoko|sh忙makwechoko]] || [[word:k忙makwechoko|k忙makwechoko]]
|-

|-

|-
